_doc: TRASH Game Tuning — edit values here to change game feel. No code changes needed.

crane._lerpDoc: 0-1. Higher = crane follows input faster. Lower = more momentum/swing.

laser._doc: chargeMs = how long the laser charges (visual bar left→right) before firing. Coverage must stay above threshold for the full charge duration.

settling._doc: Piece must stay below velocityThreshold for frameCount consecutive frames to count as settled.

materials._doc: Each material changes how a piece behaves on the crane and after dropping. density affects swing inertia (heavier = less swing). ropeStiffness/ropeDamping override the crane defaults per-material. restitution = bounciness, friction = grip.

aluminum.label: Aluminum
aluminum._feel: Light — swingy pendulum, low bounce, grips on landing, doesn't push heavy things

steel.label: Steel
steel._feel: Heavy standard — stacks solid, barely bounces, resists being pushed

lead.label: Lead
lead._feel: Extremely heavy — dead drop, zero bounce, immovable anchor, nothing pushes it

rubber.label: Rubber
rubber._feel: Very light, very bouncy — bounces high but too light to push anything. High air drag slows it.

concrete.label: Concrete
concrete._feel: Heavy and rough — CRACKS in half on hard impact. Stacks solid, good foundation.

glass.label: Glass
glass._feel: Light, translucent blue — SHATTERS on impact. Moderate grip, fragile.

materialWeights._doc: Probability weights for each material. Higher = more common. The game rolls a weighted random to pick a material for each new piece.
